terminal_a.role: SASA zinc capping + CRO prep + patent drafting (CPU only)
terminal_a.notes: All CPU tasks complete. SASA, contact maps, CRO specs, patent draft done. Compiler ready. Waiting for MD results from B/C/D.

terminal_c.role: MD controls vs ERAP2-K392 + IRAP â€” RUNS FASGAV GATE FIRST (GPU)

notes: FASGAV gate: RMSD stays <2A (rigid 6-mer doesnt deform) but COM drift = 6.6A at 5.6ns. Peptide is sliding out as rigid body. Gate PASSES on COM drift metric. For rigid 6-mers, COM drift is better than RMSD for detecting ejection. FASGAV running to 10ns for full picture, then C starts remaining 3 runs.

terminal_e.role: V2 protein binder channel-capping redesign (CPU only)

results.recommended_approach: Hybrid V2+V4: graft VAGSAF/IAFSAF peptide tail onto binder C-terminus via GGS linker

terminal_e.notes: V2 binder bridges both divergent patches but leaves channel entrance 70% open. Ceiling (409-419) completely uncovered. Binder extends deep (442-489) instead of capping. Hybrid approach: protein body for selectivity + peptide tail for channel plugging. Boltz-2 YAMLs ready at data/boltz2_inputs/v2_hybrid_*.yaml
